name: Barley Soup Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatoes or stewed tomatoes with liquid (14.5 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble beef into a microwave-safe plastic colander suspended over a 3-quart casserole.
2. Top the colander with onion, celery, bell pepper, and garlic; cover with casserole lid or vented plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 6 minutes, stirring midway through cooking, until beef is no longer pink.
4. Discard grease and add barley, tomato paste, and bouillon to the same casserole.
5. Pour boiling water over barley; stir.
6. Top with beef mixture and tomatoes with liquid; do not stir. Re-cover and microwave on MEDIUM-HIGH (70%) for 30 minutes.
7. Stir and let stand for 5 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
Nutritional value per serving: 360 calories, 23 grams protein, 34 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fiber, 15 grams fat, 66 milligrams cholesterol, 545 milligrams sodium.
